sections.prompt: Lift your right arm slowly towards your far right side, bending at the elbow, and show me your open palm facing up at face level.
Can you slowly lift your right arm, bent at the elbow, to chest level on your right, with the back of your hand facing the floor?
Slowly bring your right arm up to chest level on your right side, bending your elbow and turning your palm downward.
Bring your right arm out to your far right, about face high, with your elbow bent and the back of your hand facing up.
Could you please raise your right arm so it's about chest high, your elbow is bent, and your palm is facing in?
Slowly bring your right arm up to chest level on your right side, bending your elbow, and make sure your palm faces inward.
Bring your right hand up slowly, keeping it to your right at face level, make sure your elbow is slightly extended and your palm is facing out, away from your body.
Can you position your right arm at chest height, out to the right, with your elbow bent and palm facing outwards?
Slowly extend your right arm slightly, bringing it up to face level and far to your right, with your palm facing left.
Hold your right arm out in front of you at chest level, elbow bent, with your palm facing to the left.
Could you please bring your right hand up to face level, far to your right, bending your elbow and showing me your right palm?
Position your right arm at chest level, far to your right, with your elbow bent and knuckles facing left.
